tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is my very first tab so please rate and comment:)

Capo 8


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
With her wine-stained lips, yeah she’s nothing but trouble[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Cold to the touch but she’s warm as a devil[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I gave all my heart but she won't heal my soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She tasted a break and I can’t get more[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
You got me in chains, you got me in chains for your love[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
But, I wouldn’t change, no I wouldn’t change this love[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
You got me chains, you got me in chains for your love[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
But, I wouldn’t change, no I wouldn’t change this love[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                 
Tryna break the chains but the chains only break me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
(Hey-ey-ey-ey, hey-ey-ey-ey, hey-ey-ey-ey)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Tryna break the chains but the chains only break me[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Alone in the night ‘til she knocks on my door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Oh no, wasted again but I can’t say no (no)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Baby tell me why, why you do, do me wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Baby tell me why, why you do, do me wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Gave you my heart but you took my soul[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
